mainEntity.name: Occupational illness vs standard workers' comp: key differences in Boise?
mainEntity.text: Occupational illness vs standard workers' comp: key differences in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Boise occupational illness claims require exposure proof over time vs. acute injuries; stricter timelines from diagnosis date.[1]

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho mirrors Utah but uses 'occupational disease' term. Latency issues dominate. Boise commuters file per exposure state; Murray firms handle Idaho appeals.[1]

name: Boise Occupational Illness vs Standard Comp
description: Boise occupational illness claims require exposure proof over time vs. acute injuries; stricter timelines from diagnosis date.[1]
